flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Roberts Wesleyan University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.0k → $23.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Roberts Wesleyan University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.4k → $38.8k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Roberts Wesleyan University are 2% below 6-year earnings ($56.3k → $55.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Roberts Wesleyan University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
